title: GHOSTLINE
description: GHOSTLINE is the most immersive military simulator inspired by BodyCam — engage solo or with others in a hauntingly authentic warzone.
body:
# Ghostline

An ultra-immersive simulation inspired by the intensity of modern FPS experiences like BodyCam and Ready or Not. Step into an unnerving atmosphere where every movement counts. Play solo against advanced NPCs or join coordinated multiplayer sessions.

The pack offers a refined, high-stakes gameplay experience. Adjusted health and damage systems introduce realistic consequences like limited mobility and progressive injuries. Authentic gear, uniforms, and equipment are based on real references. Players can operate advanced vehicles — from ground transports and helicopters to first-person drones.

Ghostline also includes advanced movement and interaction mechanics: prone positioning, dodging, sliding, and high-tech optics such as thermal and night vision. Multiple gameplay modes support both solo operations and cooperative challenges.

## Features

- BodyCam-style visuals for maximum immersion  
- Expanded arsenal — from close-quarters weapons to heavy equipment  
- Controllable vehicles — cars, transports, helicopters, FPV drones, and more  
- Specialized shooting techniques — no crosshair, precision-focused aiming  
- Realistic physics — ragdolls, environment interaction, and spatial audio  
- Overhauled health and damage system  
- Clean, minimal interface with tactical feel  
- Hand-crafted environments for solo and team scenarios  

## Motto

**GHOSTLINE:** No HUD. No mercy. Just hunt.
